page_summary: Assembly instructions for the Skylar dresser.

instruction_steps.text: We recommend that you assemble this product with the assistance of another person: this will make the assembly easier, and will help eliminate damage to the product or injury to person during assembly.
Please do not over tighten screws or bolts until the assembly is completed.
Please put all parts on a non-abrasive floor before assembly, and follow the assembly steps to assemble your newly purchased product correctly and efficiently.
